title: T-Mobile: Standardized Container-Based Architecture That can be Automatically Deployed Anywhere

description:
Learn how T-Mobile manages automation and deployment of their AWS infrastructure consistently for 100 internal teams across AWS regions and AWS Local Zones. Thom walks us through how they used Kubernetes, Amazon  EC2, AWS Transit Gateway, AWS CloudWatch and ELB to build a standard architecture template that can be deployed in any region to support hundreds of applications.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO​

#AWS #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: T-Mobile: Standardized Container-Based Architecture That can be Automatically Deployed Anywhere
